headlines: Tech support chap told angry customer to think inside the box – and solved the problem
NTP server that traveled back in time caused massive Aussie mobile outage
South Korea making its own security-centric AI model
Chinese memory ban would cut off RAMpocalypse relief
crew_quote: "I mean, who needs a proper weather report when you've got a time-traveling server messing with Aussie phones? It's like a curry — a bit spicy and utterly unpredictable!"
